stories.title: **Headline:** Jackie Robinson Day Eve — How MLB Will Honor No. 42 on April 15

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tomorrow is Jackie Robinson Day.

On April 15, 1947, Robinson took the field for the Brooklyn Dodgers — and changed the game, the country, and the meaning of courage forever.

Every player in MLB will wear No. 42. Every game is a tribute. #Jackie42 #MLBTogether

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
79 years ago tomorrow, a man put on a Dodgers uniform and walked into history.

Jackie Robinson didn't just break a barrier. He carried the weight of a nation — and played some of the best baseball anyone has ever seen.

April 15. No. 42. Respect. #Jackie42

article.headline: Jackie Robinson Day 2026 — Baseball Celebrates Its Greatest Legacy on April 15

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: **Headline:** José Ramírez Makes Franchise History — HR Against All 29 Teams, Games Played Record

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez just homered against his 29th different MLB team.

First Guardians player EVER to do it. 408 feet. 108.1 mph off the bat.

He also became Cleveland's all-time games played leader earlier this month.

Two franchise records in 10 days. #ForTheLand #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Terry Turner held the Cleveland franchise record for most games played.

He set it nearly 108 years ago.

José Ramírez broke it April 6. Then hit a HR off every single MLB team's pitching.

At 33, Ramírez is still building his legacy. #ForTheLand #MLB

article.headline: José Ramírez Rewrites the Cleveland Record Books — Again

stories.title: **Headline:** Shohei Ohtani Makes 2026 Pitching Return — 6 Scoreless Innings, On-Base Streak at 43 Games

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani. 2026 pitching debut.

6 innings. 0 runs. 6 strikeouts. 1 hit.

He now has a 28 2/3 scoreless innings streak dating to last year — longest active in MLB.

Also: 43-game on-base streak. Tying 2009 Ichiro for longest by a Japanese-born player. #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
No pitcher has thrown more consecutive scoreless innings in the majors right now than Shohei Ohtani.

At the plate, his 43-game on-base streak ties Ichiro Suzuki (2009) for the all-time mark among Japanese-born players.

He's not human. #Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Shohei Ohtani Is Back on the Mound — and Matching Ichiro's Records at the Plate

stories.title: **Headline:** Konnor Griffin Is the Real Deal — 19-Year-Old Pirates Phenom Reaches Base in First 3+ MLB Games

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Konnor Griffin reached base safely in each of his first 3 MLB games.

He's 19.

He's the first teenage position player in MLB since Juan Soto debuted in 2018.

The Pirates may have found their franchise player. #Pirates #MLB

article.headline: Konnor Griffin Is the Pirates' Future — and He's Already Proving It

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge and the 400 Home Run Clock — The Yankees' MVP Inches Toward a Historic Mark

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge had 371 career home runs as of early April.

That's 29 from 400 — a club with only 59 members in MLB history.

Three-time AL MVP. Four 50-HR seasons. The chase for 400 has officially begun. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge Is 29 Home Runs From a Historic Milestone — The 400 HR Chase Begins

stories.title: **Headline:** Jordan Walker Leads MLB in Home Runs at 8 — Cardinals Off to Hot Start

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Jordan Walker leads MLB with 8 home runs through 16 games.

He's only the 5th Cardinals player in history to hit that many homers in the first 16 games of a season.

The Cardinals are swinging hot bats early. #STLCards #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Early MLB Power Rankings — Dodgers, Yankees, Twins Lead the Pack After 2 Weeks

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Two weeks in, the MLB picture:

The Dodgers are the clear favorite. The Twins have won 7 of 8. The Cardinals are slugging. The Phillies beat the Cubs 13-7 Monday.

And Garrett Crochet gave up 11 runs in 1 2/3 innings.

Early vibes only. #MLB
